articles.title: Calls for Caste Violence Spark Outrage
articles.body: Anon was calling for violence against low castes, listing gruesome methods of harm and murder. This sparked vitriolic replies from other users. In another thread, Anon discussed the death of a 24-year-old erotic model who was livestreaming during the COVID-19 pandemic in Italy. One user sought advice on transforming from 'incel to Chad' in two months. Anon also insulted Buddhists, calling them 'dumb' and 'atheist'. Elsewhere, a user claimed Indian nationalism is tied to Pakistan's existence, suggesting patriotism would decline if Pakistan vanished. The sheer volume of responses to the call for caste violence was striking - it's clear that such rhetoric can incite strong reactions.

articles.title: Anon Calls for Violence Against Low Castes, Sparking Vitriolic Replies
articles.body: An anonymous poster opened the thread with a list of violent actions against low castes, including beheading, acid attacks, and rape. The original post read: 'Kill low castes Behead low castes Drop low castes in a vat of acid Throw low castes into meat grinder Use low castes as manure Rape low castes Drag low castes out into streets and set them on fire Gas low castes.' Other posters responded with their own views on low castes. One anon claimed that low castes are responsible for India's poverty and poor international reputation, stating that 'Poor Indians, scammers and streetshitters are all LCs, giving us bad rep.' Another poster suggested that allowing low castes to use upper caste surnames would not solve issues, citing cases where low castes allegedly commit crimes and then blame upper castes. This poster stated: 'Low caste proceeds to rape other LC >Blame it all on the UC for how LC act >Many such cases.' A respondent brought up a specific case of a dalit man accused of raping a 5-year-old, noting that the dalit community and its supporters abandoned him. This poster remarked: 'However the moment he was caught raping a 5 year old, (which all subhumans do) entire chuddist and bhim team abandoned him.' Anon also claimed that certain minority groups have made positive contributions to India, but low castes have not. This poster listed examples, including Sikhs in the army, Northeast Indians in football, and Muslims in science, technology, and cuisine. Some posters discussed reservations and caste-based policies. One respondent stated that using reservations is 'dysgenic' and leads to 'total rejerbhation.' Another poster mentioned that the formation of the Other Backward Classes (OBC) category, which includes some individuals from 'fallen' upper castes and mutts, was more contentious than reservations for low castes. The thread also included discussion of genetics and social issues. One poster argued that the problems faced by low castes can be attributed to epigenetics and the consequences of 'defending child rapists' over generations.

articles.title: Erotic Model's Livestream Leads to Death
articles.body: Anon described a 24-year-old Onlyfans and PornHub erotic gay model who was livestreaming from Italy during the COVID-19 pandemic. The model was talking about the latest news while a radio station played in the background. Another anon provided a case from a German Forensic Medicine textbook, where a 24-year-old man intentionally caused the death of his 28-year-old gay partner in 2004. Anon also shared a case of a 23-year-old woman who was doing it with her male partner as a spotter. He had waited too long, leaving her hanging for a minute while he masturbated, getting highly aroused by seeing her convulsing in the noose. A different anon mentioned an 18-year-old young man streaming on an erotic platform. A viewer requested that he masturbate while hanging himself for a donation. The viewer suggested using a bed sheet since the streamer didn't have a rope. There was discussion about a streamer's death, with some debating whether it was a suicide or an accidental death. One anon noted that people get aroused by strange things, such as imagining being killed by hanging or strangulation. The brain deprived of blood can create a hallucinogenic effect. Anon also discussed their personal experience with watching gore videos since they were 13. They found hanging videos uncomfortable, even though they were desensitized to gore. Other cases were shared, including a 27-year-old man who streamed on LiveJasmin while wearing a condom. He passed out and got strangled to death, with his stream continuing for 23 minutes after he died.

articles.title: Incel to Chad Transformation Advice
articles.body: Anon kicked off the discussion with a query on transforming from an incel to a 'Chad' in just two months. One respondent suggested that the OP already has sex but wants to have kids and make more money. This anon mentioned losing virginity at 25 to a 26-year-old and joked about not wanting to make her pregnant. Another anon advised the OP to stop using labels like 'randis' and instead view promiscuous women as simply that, which they claim enhances one's chances of being with one. A different poster recommended getting a vasectomy, stating it's not worth having a child in the current economy. They claimed governments want more population to maintain a workforce for their children. A conversation about underwear types also emerged, with one poster explaining the difference between thongs and G-strings. One anon asked for advice on how to interact with women without using cheap Hindi abuses, and another provided a lengthy response on how to transform, telling the OP to go to the gym, eat protein, sleep, grow a beard, get a haircut, stop masturbating, and stop complaining. The thread also included some personal attacks, with one poster calling another a 'fagyush' and 'confirmed' as such. The accused responded by calling the accuser 'kek faggot' and expressing disinterest in their opinion on censorship.

articles.title: Anon Calls Buddhists 'Dumb', Atheist
articles.body: Anon questioned the intelligence of Buddhists, calling them 'dumb' and 'atheist'. The original poster claimed Buddhism leads to 'cuckery' and made many North Indians 'Vegan and subhuman'. Anon responded that Buddhism emerged from one person, turned the subcontinent vegan, and was later chosen by non-Indians as a better religion. Another anon noted that actual Buddhist scholars do not recognise Ambedkarite Buddhism as it is a political ideology with Buddhist flavour. Anon also stated that Buddhism operates like parasitism and relies on bad faith and moral superiority. Others chimed in, saying Buddhism was ruined when Dalits converted to it, and that Hinduism can only be revived if 'low castes' are eliminated.

articles.title: Indian Nationalism Tied to Pakistan's Existence
articles.body: Anon posted that if Pakistan vanished, Indian patriotic zeal would plummet to historical lows. Another anon countered that Indians don't obsess over Pakistan, having better things to do. One respondent believed that Pakistan's existence isn't the issue, but rather Islam being a death cult that prevents coexistence. A different anon argued that low-caste individuals, or 'dasyus,' and Islam are both enemies of Aryans. The idea that Indian nationalism relies on Pakistan's existence was also mocked.
